stages.name: unit_tests_failing_first
stages.evidence: Before implementation the task-specific tests failed as expected: cache KeyInputs lacked project_hash/environment_hash, zig_version lacked supportedLabel/fatalStatusLine/failureExit, UTF-8 boundary tests returned 4096-byte invalid excerpts, duplicate physical candidates were not deduped, invalid candidates were retained, parse failures were silently dropped, and AI context fabricated zig build test instead of report command evidence.

stages.name: unit_tests
stages.evidence: Full suite passed after implementation (526 tests).

residual_risk: Parse/read/source-missing failures now surface as deterministic fatal diagnostics instead of silently producing incomplete mutation sets. The CLI message for parse failures is intentionally compact; richer per-file diagnostic payloads can be added later as an additive report/diagnostic extension.
Result-cache reuse remains disabled; this task hardens key inputs before future reuse by adding project-wide source and minimal-environment hashes.
The root audit markdown files are included in task 122 scope as source evidence artifacts and remain untracked repository files unless the user chooses to commit or remove them.
